none.justification: Answer A correctly found the 59 bare-form `#include "eloop.h"` files and correctly said no headers include `eloop.h`, so the transitive contribution is empty. It missed the GT's central trap: 58 additional `.c` files directly include the same physical header as `#include "utils/eloop.h"`, so the true direct count is 117; the rubric caps this at 2.

ccodegraph.justification: Answer B gives the true count of 117 and correctly explains that the transitive closure adds zero because no header includes `eloop.h`. Although its grouped list has minor internal count-label inconsistencies, it captures the key GT requirements: both spellings/same header result and no transitive header contribution.

lsp.justification: Answer C has the same gap as Answer A: it reports only the 59 literal bare `#include "eloop.h"` matches and correctly verifies no header transitive includes. It misses the 58 direct `#include "utils/eloop.h"` files that resolve to the same physical header, so it is incomplete under the GT rubric.
